hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then pnpm biome format --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && grep -n 'console\.log' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️  console.log detected — use pino logger instead (see CLAUDE.md)'; fi; exit 0
